memories.title: Verification first
memories.content: Always rerun the exact failing verification command before claiming the task is done.

memories.title: Sleep-rank share flow
memories.content: Prefer real WeChat share pathways over local fake invite selection when implementing sleep-rank invite flow.

memories.title: Sleep-rank history rule
memories.content: Sleep-rank history must only show completed challenges and cancelled records should be deleted instead of archived.

memories.title: Sleep-rank engine boundary
memories.content: Keep engine logic independent from mini program page code so multi-user and share flows stay testable.

memories.title: Gomoku privacy chain
memories.content: Gomoku auth is only ready after cloud read-back succeeds; privacy errors must stay distinct from user cancellation.

memories.title: Gomoku home render regression
memories.content: Apparent home toggle bugs in gomoku can actually be render crashes in render/home-view.js.

memories.title: Gomoku auth session note
memories.content: The root cause was treating local login success as done before gomokuGetProfile read-back verified cloud persistence.

memories.title: Play page task switching
memories.content: selectedTaskId must survive rerenders on play.html so switching tasks does not reopen the wrong outcome state.

memories.title: Play route copy contract
memories.content: Update route tests to current copy instead of forcing stale View Outcome text back into runtime behavior.

memories.title: Outcome modal session note
memories.content: The root cause was result-modal.hidden getting lost during a refactor, which made the modal appear permanently visible.

memories.title: Copycatcher token auth
memories.content: Treat backend token auth, report history, and blockchain ledger sync as one workflow and verify all three before calling the flow complete.

memories.title: Copycatcher PROGRESS consolidation
memories.content: Keep a single PROGRESS document so history, auth, similarity, and evidence-ledger changes do not drift across duplicate status files.

memories.title: Ledger sync session note
memories.content: The root cause was report completion updating UI state without confirming the blockchain ledger write had succeeded.

memories.title: Local-vault SummaryUseCases
memories.content: Keep SummaryUseCases and rule_based_memory_runtime.dart isolated so the Hybrid Memory Runtime sidecar stays easy to delete or extend.

memories.title: Local-vault slm_cache cleanup
memories.content: The MediaPipe cleanup renamed slm_cache consistently and the repo should not reintroduce the old cache naming anywhere else.

tasks.query: Fix the WeChat invite flow and keep the engine layer testable.
Debug the gomoku auth flow so privacy cancellation and cloud sync failures are not mixed together.
Fix play page task switching and the outcome modal without forcing old route copy back into the UI.
Repair copycatcher report history so token auth and blockchain ledger sync stay consistent.
Continue the Hybrid Memory Runtime work without letting the old slm_cache cleanup or repo-wide MediaPipe work blur the app-level SummaryUseCases direction.
